heading: We tell India's stories with the numbers attached
intro: India in Data is a data-driven editorial site. Every piece we publish is anchored by a chart or a stat, written in plain language, and organised so you can browse by section or by topic. We sit somewhere between a data-journalism platform and a modern insights site: credible, neutral, and built for the public interest — not for clicks.
usingOurWork: Our charts and write-ups are free to share, embed and reuse for non-commercial purposes, with attribution to India in Data and a link back to the original piece. For commercial licensing or the underlying datasets, write to us through the contact page.
